blurb.en: Among all screened tickers, GLD is showing the strongest entry signal right now. It has retraced 22.1% from its peak, with RSI at the 10th percentile — historically one of the better setups for a Smart DCA trigger. Formula score: 83.6/100.
blurb.zh: 本期所有篩選標的中，GLD 的入場訊號最強。距高點回撤 22.1%，RSI 百分位 10%，歷史上這個位置的定投勝率相對較高。公式評分：83.6/100。

blurb.en: GILD is down 19.4% from its high, placing RSI at the 15th historical percentile. Growth names can swing hard — this kind of reset is where our AI formula tends to find value. Entry score: 80.0/100.
blurb.zh: GILD 距高點下跌 19.4%，RSI 歷史百分位 15%。成長股波動大，這類深度修正正是 AI 公式設計尋找的入場點。入場評分：80.0/100。

blurb.en: AVAX-USD has pulled back 78.1% with RSI at the 1th percentile — a combination that historically precedes recoveries in this asset class. Smart DCA score: 87.3/100.
blurb.zh: AVAX-USD 回撤 78.1%，RSI 百分位 1%。這種組合在此類資產的歷史中常出現在反彈前夕。公式評分：87.3/100。
